title: idd-verify ensemble findings
description: Structured-output contract for the /idd-verify ensemble's dynamic-workflow backend (formalize-idd-verify-ensemble, task 2.1). Each reviewer agent's structured output AND the merged result conform to `findings_result`. Preserves the legacy manual-fan-out shape (severity / file / title / body) and adds an explicit `lens` so the merge step can attribute + dedup. The manual fan-out fallback MUST emit the same shape so downstream posting/triage is backend-agnostic.

lens.description: Which reviewer surfaced this finding. `codex` = cross-model blind verifier; `devils-advocate` = adversarial refutation pass.

severity.description: On merge/dedup of the same underlying issue across lenses, the highest severity wins (preserves the legacy 'severity 取最高' rule).

title.description: One-line summary used as the dedup key together with `file`.

file.description: Repo-relative path / location the finding concerns; null when not file-scoped (e.g. a requirements-coverage gap).

line.description: Optional line number; null/omitted when not applicable. Advisory only — must not be the sole locator.

body.description: Detail: evidence, reasoning, and (where applicable) the suggested fix.

findings.description: Zero or more findings. Empty (or all-INFO) means the lens passed.

verdict.description: Optional aggregate convenience field. PASS iff `findings` is empty or every finding is severity INFO.
